scripts.d1:count:entries:local: wrangler d1 execute cashflow_db --local --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS entries_count FROM cashflow_entries;"
scripts.d1:count:entries:remote: wrangler d1 execute cashflow_db --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS entries_count FROM cashflow_entries;"
scripts.d1:count:org-members:local: wrangler d1 execute cashflow_db --local --command "SELECT organization_id, COUNT(*) AS members FROM organization_members GROUP BY organization_id ORDER BY organization_id;"
scripts.d1:count:org-members:remote: wrangler d1 execute cashflow_db --remote --command "SELECT organization_id, COUNT(*) AS members FROM organization_members GROUP BY organization_id ORDER BY organization_id;"
